metadata.description: Name of the resource group hosting all narrative platform resources.
Azure region for all resources. Existing stack lives in centralus.
Short suffix appended to globally-unique resource names. Lowercase alnum, 3-9 chars.
Azure AD principal IDs (object IDs) that should receive Key Vault Secrets Officer.
Region for Cosmos DB account. Defaults to westus2 (eastus has capacity constraints).
Principal IDs granted Cosmos DB Built-in Data Contributor.
Container image for the ingestion worker. Infra deploy preserves the live image; only falls back to placeholder on first deploy.
Minimum replicas for job-ingestor. Set to 0 by default — the ingestion CI workflow sets it to 1 when deploying.
Container image for job-extractor. Preserved by infra workflow.
Container image for job-aggregator. Preserved by infra workflow.
Container image for job-classifier. Preserved by infra workflow.
Container image for job-narrative-detector. Preserved by infra workflow.
Container image for job-acs-scorer. Preserved by infra workflow.
GHCR username for pulling worker images. Leave empty to skip registry binding.
GHCR PAT (read:packages). Passed through to Container Apps as a registry secret.
Tag map applied to every resource.
Azure region.
Suffix for globally-unique storage account name.
Tags applied to the storage account.
Azure region.
Suffix for the Event Hubs namespace name.
Tags applied to the namespace.
Azure region.
Suffix for the Key Vault name.
Tags applied to the vault.
Object IDs of admins receiving Key Vault Secrets Officer.
Azure region.
Suffix for workspace + component names.
Tags applied to all resources.
Azure region.
Suffix for environment + app names.
Tags applied to all resources.
Resource ID of the Log Analytics workspace from the monitoring module.
Container image for the ingestion worker. Defaults to a public MCR placeholder; CI deploy overrides with the real ghcr.io image.
Minimum replicas for job-ingestor. Defaults to 0 so infra deploy never auto-starts it; the ingestion CI workflow sets this to 1 when deploying the real image.
Container image for job-extractor. Preserved from live deployment by infra workflow.
Container image for job-aggregator. Preserved from live deployment by infra workflow.
Container image for job-classifier. Preserved from live deployment by infra workflow.
Container image for job-narrative-detector. Preserved from live deployment by infra workflow.
Container image for job-acs-scorer. Preserved from live deployment by infra workflow.
GHCR username for pulling worker images. Leave empty to skip registry binding (placeholder/public images only).
GHCR password / PAT with read:packages. Provided by infra workflow via secret param.
Key Vault URI passed to workers as KEYVAULT_URI.
Event Hubs FQDN passed to workers as EVENT_HUB_NAMESPACE.
Storage account name passed to workers as BLOB_ACCOUNT_NAME.
Cosmos DB account endpoint passed to extractor and aggregator workers as COSMOS_ENDPOINT.
Resource ID of the Key Vault. Used to assign Key Vault Secrets User to worker managed identities.
Resource ID of the Blob storage account. Used to assign Storage Blob Data Contributor to job-ingestor.
Resource ID of the Event Hubs namespace. Used to assign EH Sender/Receiver roles.
Azure region.
Suffix for globally-unique account name.
Tags applied to all resources.
Principal IDs granted Cosmos DB Built-in Data Contributor.
Existing Cosmos DB account name (no globally-unique check; must already exist).
Principal IDs (managed-identity object IDs) to grant Cosmos Data Contributor.
